Match.title: Match
Match.description: Details of a football match and the bets placed on it by friends.

bets.description: Map of participant names to their score predictions

isCompleted.description: True if the match has been played and the official score is filled

manualWinner.description: Custom picked overall winner string if manually set

createdAt.description: Epoch timestamp of when the match card was created

FoodVote.title: FoodVote
FoodVote.description: Voto de comida de un participante especifico para la porra

food.description: Option voted for (e.g., Burger King 🍔, etc.)

votedAt.description: Epoch timestamp when vote was cast

/matches/{matchId}.description: Stores each World Cup match card and all friend predictions.

/food_votes/{participantName}.description: Coleccion de votos de comida, uno por cada participante.
